titles.romaji: Tennis no Ouji-sama OVA ANOTHER STORY: Kako to Mirai no Message
titles.native: テニスの王子様　OVA ANOTHER STORY ～過去と未来のメッセージ
synonyms: The Prince of Tennis: Another Story - Messages From Past and Future
titles.tmdb_title: The Prince of Tennis Another Story

description:
An OVA series covering the past and the future of the regulars that participated in the National Tournament.

Volume 1 features two episodes, one starts with an episode featuring Seigaku visiting Osaka for a practice match with Shitenhouji, and an episode featuring Atobe's start at Hyoutei in his first year.

Volume 2 also features two episodes, one starts with the second part of Seigaku's visit to Osaka, and an episode on Kirihara's start at Rikkai in his first year.
